_comment: KUT project tag-scheme overlay. Copy to <project>/_BIM_COORD/tag_schemes.json. Merged by id over the corporate STING_TAG_SCHEMES.json, project entries win. This enables the kut-temple-example scheme and maps STING building LOC codes to two-digit BEP volume codes. Adjust the LOC map + originator to the agreed BEP volume table once the Owner's BIM standards arrive in week 1 of mobilisation.

schemes.name: Kampala Uganda Temple (KUT) element identifier
schemes.description: KUT-<originator>-<volume>-<level>-<discipline>-<number>. LOC maps STING building codes to two-digit BEP volume codes (BLD1 Temple -> 01 ... BLD6 Guard House -> 06, EXT site -> 00). Project + originator codes are read from ProjectInformation at render time.
